title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates:
Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates!
